test_scenarios.given: An HTTP listener on port 80 with redirect to HTTPS on port 443 using HTTP_301
test_scenarios.then: The policy should pass because the redirect is properly configured

test_scenarios.given: An HTTP listener on port 80 with redirect to HTTPS on port 443 using HTTP_302
test_scenarios.then: The policy should pass because HTTP_302 is also acceptable

test_scenarios.given: An HTTP listener on port 80 with redirect using #{protocol} and #{port} interpolation
test_scenarios.then: The policy should pass because interpolated values are acceptable

test_scenarios.given: An HTTP listener on port 80 with forward action to target group (no redirect)
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because HTTP traffic is not redirected to HTTPS

test_scenarios.given: An HTTP listener on port 80 with redirect to HTTP on port 80 (same protocol)
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because the redirect is not to HTTPS

test_scenarios.given: An HTTP listener on port 80 with redirect to HTTPS on port 8443 (wrong port)
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because the redirect is not to port 443

test_scenarios.given: An HTTP listener on port 80 with fixed-response action
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail because there is no redirect action
The policy should not evaluate (filtered out by protocol and port)

test_scenarios.given: An HTTP listener on port 8080 (not port 80)
test_scenarios.then: The policy should not evaluate (filtered out by port)
